content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://doi.org/10.5604/01.3001.0010.3812", "source_title": "Vegetables and fruit, as a source of bioactive substances, and impact on memory and cognitive function of elderly.", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Muslims fast during the daytime (approximately 15 hours between sunrise and sunset) for a month during the Ramadan period every year.", "direct_quote": "Muslims fast during the daytime (approximately 15 hours between sunrise and sunset) for a month during the Ramadan period every year.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "IF involves reduced or no caloric intake in an intermittent pattern, such as short periods of very restricted caloric intake or fasting inte...", "direct_quote": "IF involves reduced or no caloric intake in an intermittent pattern, such as short periods of very restricted caloric intake or fasting interspersed with normal caloric intake.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "The most studied IF interventions include 2 days of CR or fasting per week (5:2 diet) and alternate-day fasting (ADF) [22].", "direct_quote": "The most studied IF interventions include 2 days of CR or fasting per week (5:2 diet) and alternate-day fasting (ADF) [22].", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
